creator: hybridx87@gmail.com
text:
/boot/loader.conf;

if_ipw_load="YES"
legal.intel_ipw.license_ack=1

/etc/rc.conf;

.
ifconfig_ipw0="WPA DHCP media DS/11Mbps mode 11b"
.

ifconfig -v;

ipw0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        ether 00:04:23:63:19:ed
        inet 192.168.0.3 netmask 0xffffff00 broadcast 255.255.255.255
        media: IEEE 802.11 Wireless Ethernet DS/11Mbps mode 11b (DS/2Mbps)
        status: associated
        ssid xLAN channel 10 (2457 Mhz 11b) bssid 00:19:e0:10:33:b4
        authmode WPA privacy ON deftxkey UNDEF
        TKIP 2:128-bit
        TKIP 3:128-bit powersavemode OFF powersavesleep 100 txpowmax 50.0
        rtsthreshold 2346 fragthreshold 2346 bmiss 7 mcastrate 11 scanvalid 60
        -bgscan bgscanintvl 300 bgscanidle 250 roam:rssi11a 7 roam:rate11a 12
        roam:rssi11b 7 roam:rate11b 1 roam:rssi11g 7 roam:rate11g 5 -pureg
        protmode CTS -ht -htcompat -ampdu ampdulimit 8k ampdudensity - -amsdu
        -shortgi htprotmode RTSCTS -puren -wme -burst -ff -dturbo
        roaming MANUAL bintval 100 

WiFi always connect speed DS/2Mbps, and ifconfig can't change it.
txpowmax and txpower, ifconfig can't set still ist 50.0
